creator: bogus19@veggiechinese.net
text:
I could be wrong, but in my case, I think it has to do with gnupg2 being installed already, and then gnupg1 getting installed along with upgrading SpamAssassin (as a dependency).

That is, if you install / upgrade gnupg to 2 (such that only security/gnupg is installed), then install SA (which installs gnupg1 as a dependency, it seems to overwrite the symlink without warning the user that the default 'gpg' is now v1 instead of v2.
